finding: `team validate/start` checked the permission catalog, but direct `team lease/release` mutation accepted an unknown permission or a missing required scope after bypassing recipe validation.
expectedBehavior: Every permission lease mutation must pass one fail-closed hard gate that verifies catalog membership and required scope before writing runtime state.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced by tracing `runTeamLifecycleAction` in `packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts`; the direct lease path only required a non-empty permission string. Added `ATM_TEAM_PERMISSION_HARD_GATE` and direct lease/release checks; broker tests pass.
followUp: Keep direct lifecycle mutation and provider permission brokerage covered by one catalog-backed hard-gate regression.
